params.name: Hans Christian Andersen Award
params.description: The Hans Christian Andersen Award is a global award established by the International Board on Books for Young People, known as the Nobel Prize of children's literature. Named after the famous Danish fairy tale writer Andersen, the award aims to recognize writers and illustrators worldwide who have made outstanding contributions to children's literature. The award is presented every two years, honoring one writer and one illustrator for their lifetime achievements in the field of children's liter …
